---
title: "Education & Achievements"
---

```{=html}
<!-- Interactive Canvas Background -->
<canvas id="neural-canvas"></canvas>

<main style="padding-top: 8rem; min-height: 100vh;">
  
  <section class="section container reveal">
    <div class="section-header">
      <h2 class="section-title">Academic Journey</h2>
    </div>
    
    <div class="bento-grid">
      
      <div class="bento-item span-4 row-2" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(20,20,25,0.8), rgba(40,20,50,0.5)); border-color: rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.3);">
        <div class="bento-header">
          <span class="bento-date">Feb 2026 – Present</span>
        </div>
        <h3 class="bento-title" style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Master of Science, Data Science</h3>
        <h4 style="font-size: 1.2rem; color: var(--accent-light); margin-top:0;">Universidad Politécnica de Madrid (Erasmus Semester)</h4>
        <div class="bento-text" style="font-size: 1.1rem; max-width: 800px;">
          <p>Continuing advanced studies in Data Science with a focus on cross-cultural academic exchange and cutting-edge methodologies in Madrid, Spain.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="bento-item span-2">
        <div class="bento-header">
          <span class="bento-date">Oct 2024 – Present</span>
        </div>
        <h3 class="bento-title" style="font-size: 1.6rem;">Master of Science, Data Science</h3>
        <h4 style="color: #8892b0; margin-top:0;">FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg</h4>
        <div class="bento-text">
          <p><strong>Grade: 2.0</strong><br>Specializing in Machine Learning, Mathematical Optimization, and Computer Vision.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="bento-item span-2">
        <div class="bento-header">
          <span class="bento-date">Jul 2020 – Jun 2023</span>
        </div>
        <h3 class="bento-title" style="font-size: 1.6rem;">Bachelor of Science, Mathematics</h3>
        <h4 style="color: #8892b0; margin-top:0;">Amity University, India</h4>
        <div class="bento-text">
          <p><strong>Grade: 1.8</strong><br>Awarded Bronze Medal for outstanding academic performance.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section container reveal" style="padding-bottom: 8rem;">
    <div class="section-header">
      <h2 class="section-title">Achievements</h2>
    </div>
    
    <div class="bento-grid">
      <div class="bento-item span-2">
        <div style="font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">🏆</div>
        <h3 class="bento-title">Academic Excellence</h3>
        <div class="bento-text">
          <p>Awarded a Bronze Medal for outstanding academic performance during Bachelor of Science (Mathematics) at Amity University.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <div class="bento-item span-2">
        <div style="font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">📝</div>
        <h3 class="bento-title">Research Presentation</h3>
        <div class="bento-text">
          <p>Delivered a presentation on "Modelling Intuitionistic Fuzzy Sets in Real Life Using a Multi-Criterion Decision-Making Approach" at a National Conference.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

</main>

<script src="custom.js"></script>
```
